description: Bifolio from an account ledger. Dating: ca. 15th–18th century. Two of the four pages are in Judaeo-Arabic, mentioning the currency 'peraḥim' (ducat equivalents) as well as the words 'Venetian,' 'Genoese,' 'Sicilian,' 'Maghribī,' and 'French' (currencies?). One page is in Arabic script, and another is in Latin script (probably Castilian). Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic, Spanish. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
